title: Serving infrastructure: Triton / TorchServe / BentoML / k8s + DSA 1-D DP
focus: Dynamic batching, KServe, autoscaling, safe rollback.

items.label: Decode Ways
interviewQuestions: State the DP: define the state, the transition, and the base case explicitly.
Top-down (memoized recursion) vs bottom-up (tabulation) — which is more natural here, and why?
Can you space-optimize from O(n) to O(1)? Show the rolling-window trick.

items.label: Coin Change
interviewQuestions: State the DP and the order of fills. Why does coin-first-then-amount give you each combination?
How does coin-change-ii (number of ways) differ from coin-change-i (min coins)?

items.label: Model servers: TorchServe, Triton, BentoML, Seldon
interviewQuestions: Compare TorchServe, Triton, and BentoML — when does each fit?
What is dynamic batching and why does it matter for GPU utilization?

items.label: Containerization & Kubernetes for ML
interviewQuestions: Walk through deploying a model on Kubernetes with autoscaling.
When do you reach for KServe vs custom Deployment + HPA?

items.label: Traffic routing, model rollback, A/B serving
interviewQuestions: How would you do a safe rollback when a new model regresses online metrics?
What guardrail metrics would automatically trigger a rollback without a human in the loop?
